rulings.Case Title: JO ANN FARESE VS. CHASE HOME FINANCE LLC, et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Change And Hearing Date And Dept For Defts' Motion For Bifurcation Of Pltf'S Challenge Of Defts' Legal Authority To Foreclosure
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 1. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Bifurcation Of Paintiff's Challenge Of Defendant's Legal Authority To Foreclosure Continued to September 11, 2013. Moving party is ordered to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers and opposition to Department 501 no later than September 6, 2013 with cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NORTHWEST TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Motion And Motion By Wells Fargo Bank , N.A. For Release Of Interpleaded Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Release Of Interpleaded Funds GRANTED. Wells Fargo is entitled to receive $60,851.27 of interpleaded funds. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NORTHWEST TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Court'S Continuance Of Motion For Release Of Interpled Funds
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 2. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s Motion For Release Of Interpled Funds OFF CALENDAR. Duplicate entry. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: IN RE: NORTHWEST TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Deposit Undistributed Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee'S Sale Of The Property At 2176 15th Avenue, San Francisco Ca, 94116
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 2. PLAINTIFF NORTHWEST TRUSTEE SERVICES, INC.'s Motion To Deposit Undistributed Surplus Proceeds Of Trustee'S Sale Of The Property At 2176 15th Avenue, San Francisco Ca, 94116 GRANTED. Moving party shall deposit surplus funds with the Court and is permitted to deduct $3,732.07 before the deposit resulting of $125,444.21 in the total amount to be deposited. Moving party is dismissed from this action with prejudice. No opposition filed. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: STEPHANIE CHU VS. JP MORGAN CHASE NATIONAL CORPORATE SERVICES, INC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Continuance Of Demurrer Hearing Date
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 3. DEFENDANT JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A.'s Demurrer Hearing OFF CALENDAR. Defendant's counsel repeatedly failed to comply with SFLR 2.6C and this Court's orders requiring compliance. See May 6, 2013 Order CGC-12-520477. Defendant's Request for Judicial Notice in Support of Demurrer to Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Application To File Conf Settlement Agreement Under Seal
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL INC.'s Amended Application To File Confidential Settlement Agreement Under Seal OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and Court's minute order of August 23, 2013 and failed to provide courtesy copies of the moving papers. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: HANS REINHARDT VS. PRANA EIGHT PROPERTIES LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Amended Mtn For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement.
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 4. DEFENDANT PARAMOUNT HOTEL INC.'s Amended Motion For Determination Of Good Faith Settlement DENIED. Moving party failed to sustain its burden under Tech-Built. No competent evidence in support of Tech-Bilt factors provided. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: TIMOTHY D MURPHY VS. LAUREL J SCRIVANI et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Strike Or Tax Costs
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 5. PLAINTIFF TIMOTHY MURPHY's Motion To Strike Or Tax Costs GRANTED. $295 is taxed. This includes: (1) all costs associated with the orders of examination as there were no appearances for either hearing and no proofs of service were filed; and (2) the Alameda County Sheriff's fee as it was charged to Plaintiff. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: SHERENE RANDLE VS. WELLS FARGO BANK N.A. ALSO KNOWN AS et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 9. DEFENDANT WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT Continued to September 6, 2013 on Court's own motion. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: PETER GRIMES et al VS. COUNTRY WIDE BANK, AS THE ORIGINAL LENDER et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn For Ntc Of Pendency Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 6. PLAINTIFF PETER GRIMES and AGNES GRIMES' Motion for Notice Of Pendency Of Action OFF CALENDAR. Moving party failed to comply with SFLR 2.6B and this Court's minute order of August 20, 2013. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: CARLOS HERNANDEZ VS. GEORGINA MUNOZ et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 7. DEFENDANT GEORGINA MUNOZ's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED. Complaint and Notice sufficiently allege a cause of action for unlawful detainer at least based on unauthorized sublet. Complaint is not unintelligible. Defendant's counsel is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6C in future. = (501/HMD)

rulings.Case Title: JIAN CAI MAO VS. ANDY WEI-JA ZHANG et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defts And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Defts
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, September 5, 2013, line 8. PLAINTIFF JIAN MAO's Motion To Compel Responses To Discovery, To Establish Admissions From Defendants And Request For Monetary Sanctions GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions GRANTED in the amount of $885. Defendant shall personally serve responses to written discovery within 5 day sof notice of entry of order. = (501/HMD)
